title: Three-Number Permutations
description: Import itertools. Use **itertools.permutations()** to find all permutations of the list **[1, 2, 3]**. Convert the result to a list and print it. The output should show all 6 possible orderings of the numbers 1, 2, and 3.
starter_code:
# Import itertools
# Generate permutations of [1, 2, 3]
# Convert to list and print

code_requirements.fail_message: Import itertools with 'import itertools' or 'from itertools import ...'.
Use itertools.permutations() to generate all permutations of [1, 2, 3].

hints: Use itertools.permutations([1, 2, 3]) to generate all orderings
Wrap in list() and print: print(list(itertools.permutations([1, 2, 3])))
